message:
test(wave-18): add 49 pure data-type tests across proof, collector, diagnostics, task_inspector

- raptorq/proof.rs: 23 tests covering DecodeConfig, ReceivedSummary, PeelingTrace,
  EliminationTrace, InactivationStrategy, StrategyTransition, PivotEvent, ProofOutcome,
  FailureReason, ReplayError, DecodeProof, DecodeProofBuilder
- trace/distributed/collector.rs: 4 tests covering TraceRecord, TraceSummary,
  SymbolTraceCollector builder methods and edge cases
- observability/diagnostics.rs: 13 tests covering Reason, RegionOpenExplanation,
  TaskBlockedExplanation, BlockReason, CancellationExplanation, CancellationStep,
  CancelReasonInfo, ObligationLeak, Diagnostics
- observability/task_inspector.rs: 9 tests covering TaskInspectorConfig, TaskStateInfo,
  TaskDetails, TaskSummary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
